name: Fruitcake Biscotti^
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Whole blanched or slivered almonds - coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter at medium speed with an electric mixer until creamy.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating well after each addition.
3. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition. Include lemon rind and the next two ingredients, mixing well.
4. Combine flour and the remaining three ingredients; add to butter mixture, beating just until dry ingredients are moistened.
5. Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface. Lightly flour hands, then knead in cranberries, cherries, orange rind, and almonds.
6. Divide dough in half. Shape each portion into a 14-inch by 2-inch log on a lightly greased baking sheet. Flatten logs slightly.
7. Bake at 325°F for 30 to 35 minutes or until golden brown. Cool on the baking sheet for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
8. Cut each log diagonally into 1/2-inch-thick slices using a gentle sawing motion with a serrated knife. Place slices on ungreased baking sheets.
9. Bake at 325°F for an additional 10 minutes, then turn cookies over and bake another 10 minutes more. Remove to wire racks to cool.
Yield: Approximately 3 1/2 dozen
